description: For each leaf aim under a vague catch-all parent, suggest the closest structural sub-parent by embedding distance (e.g. for 'UI' children: graph view / list view / watchdog UI / project loading). Present as an approve-a-list review rather than auto-applying. This turns the 'hundreds of aims need reparenting' problem (18263fc2) into a fast human review. Directly supports the Rearrange UI aims goal.
